notes: Re-cut against packages/sdk/ENDPOINT-TIERS.md per the F-729 twin-slack ruling (SL1-SL5), implemented by F-736. Heat is ruled, fidelity is measured; both tables lint 1:1 against FIDELITY.md. The hot and warm sets are exhaustive (ruled-but-unimplemented warm gaps carry fidelity 'unsupported' plus a defer note); cold rows are named-only — the remaining upstream tail stays implicitly cold via the 501 catch-all. Warm surfaces above their shape target are mirrored in FIDELITY.md's tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only ruling: no code demotions this milestone). Message drafts have no Web API analog to name a row for (PS, client-UI concept) — recorded here, not as a surface.

tools.name: slack_post_message
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:post-and-read — the core agent messaging chain; MCP: vendor first-party server ships the message write.

tools.name: slack_reply_to_thread
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:post-and-read — threaded follow-up on the messaging chain; MCP: vendor thread read/write tools.

tools.name: slack_add_reaction
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): MCP:add_reaction (vendor first-party tool); TC:post-and-read — ack/verify step on the messaging chain.

tools.name: slack_get_channel_history
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:post-and-read — the channel read agents poll after posting; MCP: vendor channel-read tool.

tools.name: slack_get_thread_replies
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:post-and-read — thread read on the messaging chain; MCP: vendor thread-read tool.

tools.name: slack_list_channels
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery — channel lookup precedes nearly every chain; MCP: vendor channel search/read tools.

tools.name: slack_get_users
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery — user lookup precedes DMs, invites, and mentions; MCP: vendor user-search tool.

tools.name: slack_get_user_profile
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery; MCP:read_user_profile (vendor first-party tool).

tools.name: slack_search_messages
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729, SL2): TC:discovery; MCP: vendor search suite (5 search tools). F-736 hot-gap fill — an MCP-only agent could not search before this tool; backed by the existing semantic search.messages domain.

tools.name: slack_get_reactions
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729, SL2): MCP:get_reactions (vendor first-party tool); TC:post-and-read verify step. F-736 hot-gap fill backed by the existing semantic reactions.get domain.

tools.name: slack_list_channel_members
tools.justification: Ruled hot (F-729, SL2): MCP:list_channel_members (vendor first-party tool); TC:discovery. F-736 hot-gap fill backed by the existing semantic conversations.members domain.

rest.name: auth.test
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:sdk-bootstrap — every @slack/web-api client calls it first.

rest.name: chat.postMessage
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:post-and-read — the core agent messaging chain; MCP: mirrored by the message-write tool.

rest.name: chat.update
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729, SL1): TC:agents-edit-own-updates — agents editing their own progress/status messages is a real chain; no vendor MCP tool, task chain wins per the rubric.

rest.name: chat.delete
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729, SL1): TC:agents-edit-own-updates — retract/replace step of the same chain; no vendor MCP tool, task chain wins per the rubric.

rest.name: chat.scheduleMessage
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:schedule-then-adjust; MCP:schedule_message (vendor first-party tool).

rest.name: chat.deleteScheduledMessage
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:schedule-then-adjust — one chain with chat.scheduleMessage (schedule, then adjust).

rest.name: conversations.list
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery; MCP: vendor channel search/read tools.

rest.name: conversations.info
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery; MCP: vendor channel-read tools.

rest.name: conversations.create
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:channel-setup; MCP:create_conversation (covers channel/group-DM/IM).

rest.name: conversations.history
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:post-and-read; MCP: vendor channel-read tool.

rest.name: conversations.replies
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:post-and-read; MCP: vendor thread-read tool.

rest.name: conversations.invite
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:channel-setup; MCP:create_conversation covers membership setup.

rest.name: conversations.join
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:channel-setup — the agent joins before posting.

rest.name: conversations.leave
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: rare cleanup chain; no vendor MCP tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: conversations.kick
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: rare moderation chain; no vendor MCP tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: conversations.archive
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: rare cleanup chain; no vendor MCP tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: conversations.members
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery; MCP:list_channel_members (vendor first-party tool).

rest.name: conversations.open
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:channel-setup — DM open precedes direct-message chains; MCP:create_conversation covers IM/group-DM.

rest.name: reactions.add
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): MCP:add_reaction (vendor first-party tool); TC:post-and-read ack step.

rest.name: reactions.remove
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: undo chain, rare; no vendor MCP tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: reactions.get
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): MCP:get_reactions (vendor first-party tool); TC:post-and-read verify step.

rest.name: users.list
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery; MCP: vendor user-search tool.

rest.name: users.info
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery; MCP: vendor profile-read tool.

rest.name: users.lookupByEmail
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery — email is the id agents usually start from.

rest.name: users.profile.get
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery; MCP:read_user_profile (vendor first-party tool).

rest.name: users.profile.set
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC:set-own-status is plausible but no vendor MCP write exists. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: pins.add
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: occasional chain; MCP: conspicuously absent from the vendor's first-party server. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: pins.remove
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: occasional chain; MCP: absent from the vendor's first-party server. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: pins.list
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: occasional chain; MCP: absent from the vendor's first-party server. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: search.messages
rest.justification: Ruled hot (F-729): TC:discovery; MCP: vendor search suite (5 search tools).

rest.name: files.upload
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL5): metadata-only legacy v1 upload (divergence #7), no binary storage — fidelity shape, at target; MCP: vendor ships only the read side (read_file).

rest.name: files.info
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL5): metadata-only, no binary storage — fidelity shape, at target; MCP:read_file (vendor first-party tool).

rest.name: files.list
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL5): TC: occasional file-context read; metadata-only, no binary storage — fidelity shape, at target.

rest.name: files.delete
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL5): TC: rare cleanup step on the file chain; metadata-only, no binary storage — fidelity shape, at target.

rest.name: bookmarks.add
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: occasional chain; MCP: absent from the vendor's first-party server. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: bookmarks.remove
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: occasional chain; MCP: absent from the vendor's first-party server. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: bookmarks.list
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: occasional chain; MCP: absent from the vendor's first-party server. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: team.info
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729): TC: context read adjacent to hot chains; no vendor MCP tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (M5 additive-only).

rest.name: canvases.create
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL3): MCP: vendor first-party server ships 3 canvas tools; growing agent chain. Gap (unsupported < shape target) deferred — F-736 fills hot gaps only; strongest post-M5 promotion candidate.

rest.name: canvases.edit
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL3): MCP: vendor first-party server ships 3 canvas tools. Gap (unsupported < shape target) deferred — F-736 fills hot gaps only; strongest post-M5 promotion candidate.

rest.name: canvases.delete
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL3): MCP: vendor canvas toolset implies lifecycle cleanup. Gap (unsupported < shape target) deferred — F-736 fills hot gaps only.

rest.name: conversations.setTopic
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL4): TC:set-channel-topic — a classic agent task; no vendor MCP tool. Gap (unsupported < shape target) deferred post-M5.

rest.name: conversations.setPurpose
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL4): TC:set-channel-topic sibling; no vendor MCP tool. Gap (unsupported < shape target) deferred post-M5.

rest.name: emoji.list
rest.justification: Ruled warm (F-729, SL4): MCP:search_emojis (vendor first-party tool); trivial read. Gap (unsupported < shape target) deferred post-M5.

rest.name: chat.postEphemeral
rest.justification: Ruled cold (F-729): PS — the twin has no per-viewer visibility model. Loud 501 envelope test-backed (app.test.ts).

rest.name: files.getUploadURLExternal
rest.justification: Ruled cold (F-729): PS — the twin serves the legacy v1 upload (divergence #7); promotion candidate when v1 sunsets. Loud 501 envelope test-backed (app.test.ts).

rest.name: files.completeUploadExternal
rest.justification: Ruled cold (F-729): PS — second half of the modern upload flow the twin does not model (divergence #7). Loud 501 envelope test-backed (app.test.ts).

rest.name: admin.*
rest.justification: Ruled cold (F-729): PS — no admin scopes modeled (divergence #6); vendor first-party server ships no admin tools. Representative loud-501 probes test-backed (app.test.ts, fidelity-parity).

rest.name: usergroups.*
rest.justification: Ruled cold (F-729): PS — outside the single-workspace twin scope; vendor first-party server ships no usergroup tools. Representative loud-501 probe test-backed (app.test.ts).

rest.name: views.*
rest.justification: Ruled cold (F-729): PS — client-UI modal surface, not on an autonomous agent chain. Representative loud-501 probe test-backed (app.test.ts).
